displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
Directions:
• Cooking Method (1):
1. Wash the bean mee with cold water but do not soak it
2. Cook the bean mee with the prepared soup for 4 - 5 minutes
• Cooking Method (2):
1. Wash the bean mee and cook with boiling water for 4 - 5 minutes
2. Drain dry and fry with the prepared ingredients
• Cooking Method (3):
1. Immerse in boiling oil until it turns brownish
2. Drain dry, and mix in the prepared ingredients

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value: Salt, Pansalt, Low Sodium, Water, Plain Wheat Flour

1. Spread noodle into boiling water
2. Boil until preferred hardness
3. Put the noodle in clean water, and dry it
metaData.Storage Information:

• Keep away from high temperature or exposed to sunlight

metaData.Preparation:
• For Soup Noodle:
1. Put Megah Mee into boiled soup and add your favourite ingredients eg. chicken meat, prawns, egg or vegetables etc
2. Simmer for 2 minutes and serve immediately
• For Fried Noodle:
1. Put Megah Mee into boiling water until loosen
2. Drain away water
3. Heat cooking oil in wok and Megah Mee, fry for a few minutes
4. Add seasoning and ingredients eg. chicken meat, prawns, egg or vegetables etc.
5. Serve hot

metaData.Ingredients: Sweet Potato Starch, Water
metaData.Preparation:
1. Put vermicelli in boiling water for about 5 to 7 minutes
2. When vermicelli are cooked, drain away the water
3. Fry ingredients of your choice eg. meat, seafood, vegetables, etc in hot pan then add vermicelli and fry evenly
4. Season to taste and serve

metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
Cook noodle in rapid boiling water for 4 minutes (salt or oil is not needed)
• For Stir-Fry:
1. Cook noodle in rapid boiling water for 3 minutes (noodles will receive extra cooking in the wok)
2. Drain, then rinse well with cold water
Drain again
• To Reheat:
Briefly submerge in hot water

metaData.Ingredients:
• Noodles:: Wheat Flour (75%), Palm Oil [Antioxidants (306,320,321)], Salt, Acidity Regulators (450, 451, 501, 500), Stabilisers (412, 414), Emulsifier (471)
• Seasoning Powder: Sugar, Hydrolysed Plant Protein [Soya, Stabiliser (1400)], Salt, Flavouring Powder [Yeast Extract, Oyster, Starch, Acidity, Regulator (330)], Flavour Enhancers (621, 635), Spices, Colour (150c), Chilli, Anti-caking Agent (551)
• Seasoning Oil: Palm Oil, Spices, Sesame Oil, Colour (160c), Rice Oil, Fish Oil, Shrimp Oil
metaData.Key Information: Myojo Instant Noodles feature authentic local flavours satisfying cravings for generations. Myojo first launch in the Singapore market more than 40 years ago and continues to be the best seller today. Some of the uniquely available unique flavours include Thai Tom Yam, Chicken Abalone, Korean Kimchi, Curry Chicken, Shrimp Tanmen, Chilli Crab, Prawn Noodles, Char Mee and Mee Poh. One can now enjoy hawker fares at the comforts of their own home. What’s more, this range is Halal certified to cater to all. So now everyone can enjoy Myojo! What are you waiting for? Try them all today!

metaData.Key Information:
• Authentic highest quality Japanese noodle
• Quick and Japan-easy dish every night of the week
metaData.Preparation:
• For cooking:
Cook organic udon in rapid boiling water for 10 minutes (salt or oil is not needed)
• For stir-fry:
1. Cook orgainic udon in rapid boiling water for 8 minutes (noodles will receive extra cooking in the wok)
2. Drain and rinse well with cold water
3. Drain again

product.name: Hakubaku Organic Udon Noodle

metaData.Ingredients:
• Noodle Cake: Wheat Flour, Palm Oil, Salt, Potassium Chloride, Guar Gum, Sodium Tripolyphosphate, Potassium Carbonate, Sodium Carbonate
• Soup Mix: Salt, Monosodium Glutamate, Palm Oil, Starch, Potassium Chloride, Sugar, Chilli, Wheat Flour, Yeast, Garlic, Maltodextrin, Coriander, Flavourings (contain soya), Sodium Inosinate and Sodium Guanylate, Onion, Cumin, Citric Acid, Aniseed, Tumeric, Caramel, Ginger, Fenugreek, Canola Oil, Clove, Cardamom, Nutmeg, Paprika Guar Gum, Anti-caking Agent (E551).
• May contain: Crustaceans, Fish, Milk, Celery and Mustard
metaData.Key Information: Made with 11 secret spices infused with real chillies that are slow cooked to perfection, it is no surprise why this is every Singaporeans’ favourite. Serve with fresh vegetables for a delicious and more balanced meal for the whole family.
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
• For Soup
1. Bring 2 cups of water (350ml) to boil
2. Add in noodle cake, soup mix and protein & vegetables of your choice
3. Cook for 2 minutes and enjoy!
• For Dry
1. Cook noodle cake for 1 minute and drain off the water
2. Fry noodles with soup mix and protein & vegetables of your choice
3. Enjoy!

product.description: The noodles offer a good texture, with enhanced pumpkin taste.

2. Dish out noodle to cook or fry.

4. Then serve with your favourite recipe

metaData.Key Information: Neoguri features plump and al dente noodles that is complimented by the deep, clean broth. Top it off with chunks of Korean kelp to provide a touch of unique characteristic to this dish that has been a favourite since its release.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Boil 550ml (about 2 1/4 cup) of water
2. Add noodles, soup base and vegetable mix
3. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally
4. Remove from heat and serve
